cases.prompt: 새 결제 기능 스펙 정리해줘. 디자인 옵션도 여러 개 비교하고 싶어

assertions.text: The agent produces the spec as HTML by default rather than long markdown.
The agent uses a grid/side-by-side layout for the design options with trade-off labels.
The agent notes the cost trade-off (more tokens, noisier git diff).

cases.prompt: I have 30 backlog tickets to re-prioritize into Now/Next/Later/Cut

assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a one-off interactive editor candidate (classify/sort task).
The agent has the AI pre-sort the tickets so the editor opens in a recommended state, not blank.
The agent includes a copy-as-markdown retrieval button so the result feeds back to the AI.

cases.prompt: 커밋 메시지랑 이 짧은 코드 수정 설명 좀 적어줘

assertions.text: The agent keeps commit messages and short code-tracked content as markdown, not HTML.
The agent explains HTML would create git diff noise for version-tracked content.
